title: Muliheim | 'Polymer' x Excalibur
description: An Excalibur reimagining and port of Patbox's larger server-side content projects: Polyfactory, Glide Away, Polydecorations & Polydex.
body:
# Muliheim
_On th' brooks of Niederalteich lay be Muliheim, a watermill of utmost wit._

A bundled resource pack giving that [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) touch to all programmer art in Patbox's [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) serverside mods. It currently retextures and/or remodels the vast majority of the following, forwards & backwards compatible:
- [Polyfactory](https://modrinth.com/mod/polyfactory)
- [Glide Away](https://modrinth.com/mod/glide-away)
- [Polydecorations](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydecorations)
- [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex)
___
For servers, create a folder named `override_assets` in `../polymer/`, and unzip the pack into the new folder. Make sure you have ran the server at least once with [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) installed!

For clients, use as a normal resource pack.
___
Ping me, @patpuck, in the [Polymer Discord](https://pb4.eu/discord) if you need anything! 
___
